input_context.user_described_change: Add a CLI flag --quiet that suppresses non-error output across every wrapper.

findings.name: Universal --quiet flag
findings.summary: Every wrapper MUST accept an optional --quiet flag that suppresses non-error stdout/stderr output. Error diagnostics MUST continue to print regardless.
findings.motivation: Users running `livespec` from CI workflows want a stripped-down output surface. The flag is universal so SKILL.md prose can be written generically.
findings.proposed_changes: Append a new row to the wrapper-CLI surface table in `SPECIFICATION/contracts.md` introducing `--quiet` as a baseline optional flag alongside `--project-root <path>`. Each wrapper MUST suppress its non-error stdout (e.g., the seed wrapper's success message) while continuing to emit structured findings on stderr.
